title: 2021 03 15 TV spot
wikitext:
[]: 2021/03/15 TV spot             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Mar 15, 2021 1:08 am There's a new TV spot out. For people curious what's what, I can tell you what scene is from what part of the movie if you've been reading the script. Cut 1-2: Shinji fishing. After Kensuke gives him a fishing rod on their trip to the containment pillar or whatever it's called, Shinji goes fishing at the NERV ruins. I believe the noise of Rei coming up behind him is why he turns in cut 2. Cut 3: Rei with an umbrella. Scene is from the first hour of the film living in the Japanese village. Cut 4: Asuka angrily manhandling Shinji. After Shinji's continued refusal to eat and throwing up whenever he sees the DSS choker on Asuka, she gets fed up with him and force-feeds him a block of rations. Cut 5: Restored greenery near the Japanese village. Cut 6: NERV ruins. Shinji goes fishing here. Cut 7: Tadpoles running through a stream in the village. Cut 8: Rei napping under a tree, surrounded by women in blue jumpsuits. Rei has been doing farming work in the village and they're taking a break. This sequence is during a montage. That's kinda nice, actually! All the footage is from the first hour of the film and doesn't give away too much, if anything. Still loving One Last Kiss, and this is a PV that will make people curious about just where the three pilots have ended up.

[]: Re: 2021/03/15 TV spot             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Mar 15, 2021 4:17 am This TV spot is pretty exciting. Also, I already realized this before from still images and such, but, man, is this film beautiful! The animation quality is amazing.

[]: Re: 2021/03/15 TV spot             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Mar 15, 2021 4:12 pm Thanks for the breakdown! Interesting stuff And yeah, this movie is gorgeous. Can't wait to see it.

[]: 2021/03/15 TV spot             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Mar 15, 2021 1:08 am There's a new TV spot out. For people curious what's what, I can tell you what scene is from what part of the movie if you've been reading the script. Cut 1-2: Shinji fishing. After Kensuke gives him a fishing rod on their trip to the containment pillar or whatever it's called, Shinji goes fishing at the NERV ruins. I believe the noise of Rei coming up behind him is why he turns in cut 2. Cut 3: Rei with an umbrella. Scene is from the first hour of the film living in the Japanese village. Cut 4: Asuka angrily manhandling Shinji. After Shinji's continued refusal to eat and throwing up whenever he sees the DSS choker on Asuka, she gets fed up with him and force-feeds him a block of rations. Cut 5: Restored greenery near the Japanese village. Cut 6: NERV ruins. Shinji goes fishing here. Cut 7: Tadpoles running through a stream in the village. Cut 8: Rei napping under a tree, surrounded by women in blue jumpsuits. Rei has been doing farming work in the village and they're taking a break. This sequence is during a montage. That's kinda nice, actually! All the footage is from the first hour of the film and doesn't give away too much, if anything. Still loving One Last Kiss, and this is a PV that will make people curious about just where the three pilots have ended up.
